lineup_source: Sweden vs Tunisia, Group F opener, 14 June 2026 (5-1 win; 3-4-1-2)

players.name: Kristoffer Nordfeldt
players.note: No documented foreign heritage; defaults to Swedish parents.

players.name: Gustaf Lagerbielke
players.note: Old Swedish noble surname; no foreign parental heritage documented.

players.name: Victor Lindelöf
players.note: Captain, born in Västerås; no documented foreign parental heritage.

players.name: Isak Hien
players.note: Born in Kista, Stockholm, to a Ghanaian father and Swedish mother.

players.name: Alexander Bernhardsson
players.note: Born in Göteborg; no documented foreign parental heritage.

players.name: Gabriel Gudmundsson
players.note: Icelandic-style surname is a red herring; father Niklas Gudmundsson is a Swedish-born former international.

players.name: Jesper Karlström
players.note: Born in Stockholm; no documented foreign parental heritage.

players.name: Yasin Ayari
players.note: Born in Solna to a Tunisian father and mother of Moroccan descent; chose Sweden over Tunisia internationally.

players.name: Benjamin Nygren
players.note: IFK Göteborg youth product; no documented foreign parental heritage.

players.name: Alexander Isak
players.note: Born in Stockholm; both parents emigrated from Eritrea in the 1980s during the civil war.

players.name: Viktor Gyökeres
players.note: Hungarian surname traces to a grandfather who fled in 1956; both parents are Swedish.
